title: stapelia paniculata subsp. scitula
intro: Stapelia paniculata subsp. scitula, also known as the 'Succulent Stoneman's Hat', is a species of flowering succulent plant in the family Apocynaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal properties, making it useful for treating various health conditions such as wounds, infections, and skin irritations. The health benefits of Stapelia paniculata subsp. scitula include its ability to promote wound healing, reduce inflammation, and protect against microbial infections. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made by infusing the leaves and stems in water, or by using the plant's extracts in topical creams and ointments.
